permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local files (e.g., reference guides, checklists, and SQL scripts listed in the Resources section). Allow read access to the workspace?
This skill may write optimized query files, index strategy checklists, or analysis results to the workspace. Allow write access?
This skill needs to read application source code to identify N+1 query patterns, ORM usage, and other database access patterns. Allow source code read access?
This skill may rewrite application code to replace N+1 query patterns with batch loading or JOIN-based queries. Allow source code modifications?
This skill references executable SQL scripts (e.g., analyze-slow-queries.sql, index-recommendations.sql) and database maintenance commands (VACUUM, ANALYZE, REINDEX). Allow shell or script execution?
This skill references companion skill resources (e.g., postgres-optimization-guide.md, query-plan-analysis.md). Allow loading referenced skills or resource files?

This skill references external guides, checklists, and scripts that may be loaded as context (e.g., references/postgres-optimization-guide.md, assets/index-strategy-checklist.md). Allow loading this external context?
